title: SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Session Metadata Schema v0.1
description: Schema for validating session_metadata.json in the SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Track synthetic/sample package. This schema is for public helper use only. It does not define CAIS, does not define Sal-Meter, does not grant compliance, does not validate benchmark performance, and does not create diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, surveillance, employment, insurance, educational, legal, or eligibility authority.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this session metadata structure.

dataset_type.description: Dataset class. Public repository examples should normally use synthetic or sample only.

session_date.description: Session date. Public synthetic data may use fictional dates.

participant_code.description: No direct identifier. Use a coded or synthetic participant/session subject code only.

condition_label.description: Optional non-diagnostic condition label for the session.

task_context.description: Short non-diagnostic description of the synthetic or research task context.

session_start.description: Optional session start timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC-like format.

session_end.description: Optional session end timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC-like format.

signals.description: List of synthetic/sample streams or signal placeholders associated with the session.

device.description: Device, mock generator, or placeholder source. Public synthetic data should identify synthetic/mock generators rather than real participant devices.

sampling_rate_hz.description: Sampling rate in Hz. JSON or CSV conversion may represent this as number or string.

quality_flag.description: Signal quality flag. This is QC only and not a diagnostic quality statement.

event_marker_file.description: Relative filename for the event marker file.

sync_method.description: Synchronization method or placeholder method used for the session.

preprocessing_version.description: Optional preprocessing version. Public examples may use placeholder values.

model_version.description: Optional model version. Public examples should avoid implying validated benchmark performance.

synthetic_status_declared.description: Whether synthetic/sample status is explicitly declared.

data_boundary.description: Public/private data boundary for this session metadata file.

raw_human_data_public.description: Public helper packages must not publish raw human data.

identifiable_data_public.description: Public helper packages must not publish identifiable data.

clinical_data_public.description: Public helper packages must not publish clinical data.

sal_meter_input_present.description: Current proxy sample packages must not contain Sal-Meter input.

cais_compliance_claim_present.description: Public helper packages must not contain CAIS compliance claims.

public_release_allowed.description: Whether this metadata object is allowed for public synthetic/sample release.

release_note.description: Boundary note for release. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

leakage_review.description: Leakage review for session-level metadata. This is not benchmark validation.

split_strategy.description: Declared split strategy or placeholder strategy.

labels_visible_for_demo.description: Whether labels are intentionally visible for synthetic structure demonstration.

deviation_note.description: Optional deviation note. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

final_boundary.description: Optional final boundary statement. Should state that the metadata is synthetic/sample only and not benchmark evidence, not Sal-Meter validation, and not CAIS compliance.
